creator: yongari@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I'm not sure you're hitting the same issue I'm trying to solve for 
a while but would you try the patch at the following URL?                
http://people.freebsd.org/~yongari/bge/bge.rx.patch2 

Before applying the patch above, you have to use latest bge(4) in 
stable/8 or stable/7. Due to newly added APIs I think the latest 
bge(4) may not build on 8.0-RELEASE so you have to use stable/8 
(e.g 8.1-PRERELEASE) in order to test the patch.
